deep_dive.title: Reach Y=-40 or below in an ocean biome — explore the absolute ocean floor

subtitle.text: The ocean floor has buried treasure, heart of the sea, and things that have not been named yet.

description: CH.08 · THE ABYSS
▸ The ocean goes down past Y=0.
Below the ocean floor is stone.
Below the stone is the cave system.
Below the cave system is everything else.
You've been at the bottom of the caves.
Go to the bottom of the ocean now.
◈ THE OCEAN FLOOR
└ Buried Treasure: X mark on map (from shipwrecks)
contains Heart of the Sea + high-value loot
└ Heart of the Sea + 8 Nautilus Shells = Conduit
Conduit: underwater beacon — Water Breathing
+ Night Vision + Haste in activation radius
└ Nautilus Shells: drop from Drowned (~3% or fishing)
└ Ocean ruins: deeper loot at floor level
└ Deep Trench: some ocean areas drop below Y=-30
extra rare loot, dangerous Aquamirae territory
◈ CONDUIT VALUE
└ Conduit activation range: 32-96 blocks
(depends on Prismarine blocks surrounding it)
└ Effect: Water Breathing (indefinite in range),
Night Vision, Haste +1
└ Build one at your underwater base
└ Never worry about Water Breathing again in that zone
▸ The Heart of the Sea was in a locked chest
at the bottom of a buried ship.
The ship went down in a storm.
The map was found rolled inside a bottle.
The bottle was found in a bird's nest.
Someone was trying very hard to lead you here.
▶ Reach Y=-40 in ocean biome [check]
▶ Find a Heart of the Sea
◇ Conduit + drained Ocean Monument = the best
underwater base. Never leave.
(Or leave for the End, reluctantly.)
